name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard mutual NDA created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law. Used for protecting confidential information shared between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA. Used to specify the parties and customised business terms, which are then incorporated into the standard Mutual NDA terms by reference.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys and covers subscription terms, order forms, and standard legal protections for cloud services.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard agreement for formalising early-stage product partnerships between vendors and design partners. Governs the relationship when a prospective customer helps shape a product before it reaches general availability.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Standard SLA terms designed to be used alongside the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement. Defines uptime commitments, remedies for downtime, and measurement methodology for cloud services.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Standard agreement for engaging professional services. Covers statement-of-work structure, deliverables, acceptance criteria, fees, and standard legal terms for services engagements.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Standard agreement for governing the processing of personal data by a vendor on behalf of a customer. Addresses GDPR and other data protection law requirements including data subject rights and security obligations.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard agreement for licensing on-premises or downloadable software. Covers license scope, restrictions, support, fees, and standard legal protections for software products.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard agreement for forming business partnerships. Covers partner roles, revenue sharing, intellectual property, and the standard legal terms that govern technology partner relationships.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Standard short-term agreement for product or service trials before a customer commits to a longer-term deal. Covers the limited scope, duration, fees, and termination rights specific to pilot engagements.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Standard agreement for governing relationships with business associates who handle protected health information (PHI). Addresses HIPAA compliance requirements for vendors processing healthcare data.

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard addendum for governing the use of artificial intelligence features and services. Addresses AI-specific concerns such as data use for model training, output accuracy, and liability for AI-generated content.
